positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical composition featuring ethereal bioluminescent flora and mystical celestial geometry. Central elements include oversized, stylized glowing mushrooms and spiraling nebulae patterns intertwined with delicate, abstract vines. The color palette must be deep indigo, vibrant teal, electric cyan, and soft, glowing emerald green, with strong contrast against a deep void background. The artwork should utilize clean, sharp outlines, strong silhouettes, and a decorative, illustrative style reminiscent of deep-sea phosphorescence and cosmic nebula art. Central composition, suitable for full-print apparel graphic.
